summary: ALL TESTS PASSED (31/31). Backend vocabulary-engine endpoints now support both mastery_course_modules and advanced_mastery_modules collections. Mastery modules (mastery-module-1 through mastery-module-17) return slides with nouns/verbs/adjectives/adverbs/collocations/idiom. Practice returns fill_blank and matching exercises. Quiz returns 10 questions with 80% passing score. Quiz submission and progress saving work for mastery modules. Advanced modules (advanced-module-1) still work (no regression).

OTHER_MASTERY_MODULES.evidence: Module 5 (Work and Employment) returns valid slides

ADVANCED_MODULE_REGRESSION.evidence: Advanced modules still work, return 'Advanced Term' category

critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly checks both advanced_mastery_modules and mastery_course_modules collections
Mastery vocab data structure (nouns/verbs/adjectives/adverbs) properly transformed to slide format
Collocations and idiom from mastery modules correctly included in slides
Practice exercises generated from mastery vocabulary with fill_blank and matching types
Quiz submission correctly looks up module in both collections for wrong answer tracking
seed_data_creation: Test users created: TEST_mastery_vocab_001, TEST_mastery_vocab_002, TEST_mastery_vocab_003
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 67 verified mastery course vocabulary engine integration. All vocabulary-engine endpoints (slides, practice, quiz, submit, progress) work for mastery-module-X IDs. Mastery slides include Noun/Verb/Adjective/Adverb/Collocation/Idiom categories. Advanced modules (advanced-module-1) still work (no regression). Frontend testing was not requested but routes should exist at /vocabulary/learn/:moduleId, /vocabulary/practice/:moduleId, /vocabulary/quiz/:moduleId, /vocabulary/production/:moduleId.

mocked_api.note: All APIs use real MongoDB queries against mastery_course_modules and advanced_mastery_modules collections
